mapper.select: SELECT di.instructor_id, di.instructor_name, di.phone, di.instructor_no, di.status, di.teaching_years,di.good_subject, COALESCE( (SELECT ROUND(AVG(score),1) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_rating dr WHERE di.instructor_id=dr.instructor_id), 0 ) AS score, dis.instructor_id, dis.student_id, ds.student_id, dc.car_id, dc.plate_number, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student dis2 WHERE di.instructor_id=dis2.instructor_id) AS student_num FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor di INNER JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student dis ON dis.instructor_id = di.instructor_id INNER JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_student ds ON dis.student_id = ds.student_id LEFT JOIN ms_stu_pro339.driving_car dc ON dc.instructor_id = di.instructor_id WHERE dis.student_id = #{studentId} LIMIT 1

SELECT week_day, time_slot, status FROM ms_stu_pro339.coach_weekly_schedule cws WHERE cws.instructor_id=(SELECT instructor_id FROM ms_stu_pro339.driving_instructor_student WHERE student_id=#{studentId} LIMIT 1) ORDER BY week_day, time_slot
